시편 73:1.content: Surely God is good to Israel, to those who are pure in heart.

시편 73:2.content: But as for me, my feet were almost gone. My steps had nearly slipped.

시편 73:3.content: For I was envious of the arrogant, when I saw the prosperity of the wicked.

시편 73:4.content: For there are no struggles in their death, but their strength is firm.

시편 73:5.content: They are free from burdens of men, neither are they plagued like other men.

시편 73:6.content: Therefore pride is like a chain around their neck. Violence covers them like a garment.

시편 73:7.content: Their eyes bulge with fat. Their minds pass the limits of conceit.

시편 73:8.content: They scoff and speak with malice. In arrogance, they threaten oppression.

시편 73:9.content: They have set their mouth in the heavens. Their tongue walks through the earth.

시편 73:10.content: Therefore their people return to them, and they drink up waters of abundance.

시편 73:11.content: They say, “How does God know? Is there knowledge in the Most High?”

시편 73:12.content: Behold, these are the wicked. Being always at ease, they increase in riches.

시편 73:13.content: Surely I have cleansed my heart in vain, and washed my hands in innocence,

시편 73:14.content: For all day long I have been plagued, and punished every morning.

시편 73:15.content: If I had said, “I will speak thus”; behold, I would have betrayed the generation of your children.

시편 73:16.content: When I tried to understand this, it was too painful for me,

시편 73:17.content: until I entered God’s sanctuary, and considered their latter end.

시편 73:18.content: Surely you set them in slippery places. You throw them down to destruction.

시편 73:19.content: How they are suddenly destroyed! They are completely swept away with terrors.

시편 73:20.content: As a dream when one wakes up, so, Lord, when you awake, you will despise their fantasies.

시편 73:21.content: For my soul was grieved. I was embittered in my heart.

시편 73:22.content: I was so senseless and ignorant. I was a brute beast before you.

시편 73:23.content: Nevertheless, I am continually with you. You have held my right hand.

시편 73:24.content: You will guide me with your counsel, and afterward receive me to glory.

시편 73:25.content: Whom do I have in heaven? There is no one on earth whom I desire besides you.

시편 73:26.content: My flesh and my heart fails, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.

시편 73:27.content: For, behold, those who are far from you shall perish. You have destroyed all those who are unfaithful to you.

시편 73:28.content: But it is good for me to come close to God. I have made the Lord Yahweh my refuge, that I may tell of all your works.
